title: Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition: Important Clarifications from Income Tax Department
content:
# Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition: Important Clarifications from Income Tax Department

Ek important update hai! Income Tax Department ne Income Tax Act, 2025 ke transition ko lekar significant clarifications provide kiye hain, jo April 1, 2026 se effective ho gaya hai. Yeh naya Act Income Tax Act, 1961 ko replace kar raha hai.

Here are the key points regarding this transition:

*   **E-filing Portal Readiness:** The official e-filing portal (incometax.gov.in) ab repealed Income Tax Act, 1961, aur naye Income Tax Act, 2025, dono ke under compliance concurrently facilitate karega.
*   **Assessment Year 2026-27 (FY 2025-26):** Taxpayers jo Assessment Year 2026-27 (for income earned during FY 2025-26) ke liye returns file kar rahe hain, jo old Act se govern hoga, unhein Income Tax Act, 1961 ke prescribed forms use karne honge.
*   **Advance Tax Payments (Tax Year 2026-27):** June 2026 se shuru hone wale advance tax payments naye Income Tax Act, 2025 ke provisions ke according kiye jayenge. Naye Act mein 'Tax Year' ka concept introduce kiya gaya hai, jo 'Previous Year' aur 'Assessment Year' ko replace karta hai for income earned from FY 2026-27 onwards.
*   **Treatment of Pending Proceedings:** Pending proceedings aur notices jo April 1, 2026 se pehle shuru hue tax years ke liye Income Tax Act, 1961 ke under issued hain, woh old Act ke provisions ke under hi continue rahenge.
*   **Official Updates:** Yeh crucial clarifications Income Tax Department ki official website par May 1, 2026, aur May 2, 2026, ko different sections ke liye review aur update kiye gaye hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Objective and scope of the New Act | Income Tax Department](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/help/objective-and-scope-of-the-new-act)

*Published on: 2 May 2026*
